current_price_update_path: ensureStateStream() -> applyStreamPositionsMark(payload) -> const next = { ...p, current_price: mark.current_price, ... } -> updateLivePositionCardInPlace(next) -> .pos-current-price DOM node
unrealized_pct_js_line: const unrealizedPct = (currentHeldPrice != null && trade.entry_px) ? ((currentHeldPrice - trade.entry_px) / trade.entry_px) * 100 : null;
backed_team_display: LIVE cards display backed_team prominently via sideText = `${trade.backed_team} ${trade.side_label}` and faded team as secondary metadata
stale_badge_behavior: LIVE cards show a STALE badge when trade.current_price_stale is true, sourced from SSE positions_mark.current_price_stale
account_strip_source: renderState() reads /api/state bankroll and r25 fields, including r25.win_rate and r25.expectancy
